vehicles.description:
2016 Land Rover Range Rover Evoque HSE

Luxury, safe, and comfortable SUV. Perfect for a family, daily driving, Costco trips, or weekend getaways. Runs and drives beautifully.
features: Like new. Fully serviced — nothing needs to be done. Fully Loaded HSE Package. AWD. Premium White Leather Interior. Panoramic Roof. Brand-new tires. Backup Camera. Heated Seats. Folding Rear Seats.

vehicles.description: 2012 Infiniti FX35 AWD – Fully Loaded. Runs and drives like new. Fully serviced and needs absolutely nothing. Fast, reliable, comfortable, and perfect for a family or daily driving.
features: Legendary 3.5L V6, No Accidents, Clean Title, White/Black Leather, BOSE Sound, Bluetooth Music, 360° Camera, New Michelin Tires, Dash Cam, Xenon Headlights, Sunroof, Smart Key, AWD, Fold-Flat Rear Seats.

vehicles.trim: 17 wheels, sunroof, V-Tex leatherette seats, 6.3 touchscreen dual zone climate
vehicles.description: 2013 VW Passat with the most reliable 2.5L engine and smooth-shifting transmission. Mostly highway miles. Perfect for work, family, or business — dependable and ready to go anywhere. Clean title in hand + bill of sale.

2024 Volkswagen ID. Buzz, fully electric, in beautiful condition. Perfect for city driving, school runs, road trips, or eco-friendly business use. Easy to park, comfortable seating for everyone, and futuristic design that turns heads everywhere.
features: Long Range Battery, Fast Charging (DC), Spacious 3-Row Interior, Digital Cockpit, Huge Touchscreen, Apple CarPlay / Android Auto, Adaptive Cruise, Lane Assist, Park Assist, 360 Camera, New Tires, Clean Title in Hand.

vehicles.description: 2025 Volkswagen Atlas Peak Edition – 3 Row SUV – AWD – Pure Gray. Brand new 2025 VW Atlas Peak Edition with panoramic roof, Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, premium sound, parking assistance with backup camera, and ambient lighting. Financing & Leasing available.
features: 2.0L Turbo + 8-speed Automatic 4MOTION AWD, 3 rows of seats (7 passengers), Ventilated front seats, heated rear seats, heated steering wheel, Pure Gray exterior with Black leatherette interior & orange stitching, Off-road ready.
